nasb.text: For evildoers will be cut off, But those who wait for the Lord, they will inherit the land.

esv.text: For the evildoers shall be cut off, but those who wait for the Lord shall inherit the land.

cnv.text: 因為作惡的必被剪除， 但等候耶和華的必承受地土。

ccb.text: 因为作恶的终必灭亡， 但等候耶和华的必承受土地。

csbs.text: 因为作恶的必被剪除， 唯有等候耶和华的必继承地土。
